# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        ansiColor('xterm')
        timeout(time: 90, unit: 'MINUTES')
    }

    parameters {
        text(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'One artifact URL per line. Supports HTTP/HTTPS/S3/Artifactory URLs.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Optional Jenkins credentials ID for downloading artifacts (username/password or secret text).'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_TARGET',
            choices: ['prod-a', 'prod-b', 'all'],
            description: 'Production deployment target'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REMOTE_PATH',
            defaultValue: '/opt/apps/releases',
            description: 'Remote path where artifacts will be uploaded'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SERVICE_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'myapp',
            description: 'Service/application name'
        )
        string(
            name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID',
            defaultValue: 'prod-ssh',
            description: 'SSH credentials for production servers'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'CLEAN_WORKSPACE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Clean workspace before download'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'VERIFY_TLS',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Verify TLS certificates during download'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'RESTART_SERVICE',
            defaultValue: true,
            description: 'Restart service after deployment'
        )
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/downloads"
        STAGING_DIR  = "${WORKSPACE}/staging"
        PROD_A_HOSTS = 'prod-a-01.example.com prod-a-02.example.com'
        PROD_B_HOSTS = 'prod-b-01.example.com prod-b-02.example.com'
    }

    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (params.CLEAN_WORKSPACE) {
                        deleteDir()
                    }
                    sh 'mkdir -p "$DOWNLOAD_DIR" "$STAGING_DIR"'

                    def urls = params.ARTIFACT_URLS
                        .split(/\r?\n/)
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    if (!urls || urls.isEmpty()) {
                        error('No artifact URLs provided.')
                    }

                    def hosts = []
                    switch (params.DEPLOY_TARGET) {
                        case 'prod-a':
                            hosts = env.PROD_A_HOSTS.tokenize(' ')
                            break
                        case 'prod-b':
                            hosts = env.PROD_B_HOSTS.tokenize(' ')
                            break
                        case 'all':
                            hosts = (env.PROD_A_HOSTS.tokenize(' ') + env.PROD_B_HOSTS.tokenize(' ')).unique()
                            break
                        default:
                            error("Unsupported deploy target: ${params.DEPLOY_TARGET}")
                    }

                    currentBuild.displayName = "#${env.BUILD_NUMBER} ${params.SERVICE_NAME} -> ${params.DEPLOY_TARGET}"
                    env.RESOLVED_URLS = urls.join('\n')
                    env.RESOLVED_HOSTS = hosts.join(' ')
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = env.RESOLVED_URLS.split('\n').findAll { it?.trim() }
                    def insecureFlag = params.VERIFY_TLS ? '' : '--insecure'
                    def commonCurl = "curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 ${insecureFlag}"

                    def downloadOne = { String url ->
                        def fileName = url.tokenize('/').last()
                        if (!fileName || fileName.trim().isEmpty()) {
                            error("Unable to determine filename from URL: ${url}")
                        }
                        def outputPath = "${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${fileName}"

                        if (params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID?.trim()) {
                            try {
                                withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID, usernameVariable: 'DL_USER', passwordVariable: 'DL_PASS')]) {
                                    sh """
                                        set -euo pipefail
                                        if echo '${url}' | grep -E '^s3://'; then
                                          aws s3 cp '${url}' '${outputPath}'
                                        else
                                          ${commonCurl} -u "\$DL_USER:\$DL_PASS" -o '${outputPath}' '${url}'
                                        fi
                                    """
                                }
                            } catch (ignored) {
                                withCredentials([string(credentialsId: params.ARTIFACT_CREDENTIALS_ID, variable: 'DL_TOKEN')]) {
                                    sh """
                                        set -euo pipefail
                                        if echo '${url}' | grep -E '^s3://'; then
                                          if [ -n "\$DL_TOKEN" ]; then
                                            export AWS_SESSION_TOKEN="\$DL_TOKEN"
                                          fi
                                          aws s3 cp '${url}' '${outputPath}'
                                        else
                                          ${commonCurl} -H "Authorization: Bearer \$DL_TOKEN" -o '${outputPath}' '${url}'
                                        fi
                                    """
                                }
                            }
                        } else {
                            sh """
                                set -euo pipefail
                                if echo '${url}' | grep -E '^s3://'; then
                                  aws s3 cp '${url}' '${outputPath}'
                                else
                                  ${commonCurl} -o '${outputPath}' '${url}'
                                fi
                            """
                        }

                        sh "test -s '${outputPath}'"
                    }

                    urls.each { url ->
                        echo "Downloading artifact: ${url}"
                        downloadOne(url)
                    }

                    sh """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        cp -f "$DOWNLOAD_DIR"/* "$STAGING_DIR"/
                        ls -lah "$STAGING_DIR"
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def hosts = env.RESOLVED_HOSTS.tokenize(' ')
                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        hosts.each { host ->
                            echo "Deploying to ${host}"
                            sh """
                                set -euo pipefail
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${host}' 'mkdir -p "${params.REMOTE_PATH}/${params.SERVICE_NAME}"'
                                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no "$STAGING_DIR"/* '${host}:"${params.REMOTE_PATH}/${params.SERVICE_NAME}/"'
                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${host}' '
                                    set -e
                                    cd "${params.REMOTE_PATH}/${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                    ls -lah
                                    if [ "${params.RESTART_SERVICE}" = "true" ]; then
                                      sudo systemctl restart "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                      sudo systemctl is-active "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                    fi
                                '
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "Deployment completed successfully to: ${env.RESOLVED_HOSTS}"
        }
        failure {
            echo 'Deployment failed.'
        }
        always {
            sh """
                set +e
                echo 'Downloaded artifacts:'
                ls -lah "$DOWNLOAD_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true
                echo 'Staged artifacts:'
                ls -lah "$STAGING_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true
            """
        }
    }
}
